steps.title: Multiply like bases
steps.content:
Multiply the coefficients and add the exponents on the common base $x$.
$$(7x^3)(4x^5)=(7\cdot4)x^{3+5}$$

steps.title: Compare coefficients
steps.content: The expression becomes $28x^8$. Since it is equivalent to $bx^8$, the coefficient $b$ is the same coefficient. The answer is 28.
